creator: warinthepocket@gmail.com
text:
I've tried to install termtter several times over about the past year. Install goes fine but I've never been able to have the program execute, it always presents me with something along the lines of :

> termtter
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:31:in `gem_original_require': no such file to load -- iconv (LoadError)
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:31:in `require'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/json-1.4.6/lib/json/common.rb:2
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:31:in `gem_original_require'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:31:in `require'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/json-1.4.6/lib/json.rb:1
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:31:in `gem_original_require'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:31:in `require'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/termtter-1.9.0/bin/../lib/termtter.rb:12
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:31:in `gem_original_require'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/rubygems/custom_require.rb:31:in `require'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/termtter-1.9.0/bin/termtter:14
        from /usr/local/bin/termtter:19:in `load'
        from /usr/local/bin/termtter:19



I've tried using both the port install, and installing through the gem utility.

Fix: 

-
How-To-Repeat: install termtter with gem or through ports
